server.command: conda run -n hisim-vllm023 env CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE=1 VLLM_LOGGING_LEVEL=INFO PYTHONHASHSEED=0 vllm serve /home/songxy/workspace/nano-vllm/huggingface/Qwen3-0.6B --host 127.0.0.1 --port 18000 --served-model-name qwen3-0.6b --max-model-len 512 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.30 --enforce-eager --enable-prefix-caching
